message:
feat(cancel): wire witness protocol into runtime cancellation flow

- Add cancel_witness field to asx_task_slot
- asx_task_cancel now creates a witness when first signaling cancel
- asx_checkpoint now advances the witness to CANCELLING phase when
  the task acknowledges cancellation

This completes the witness protocol integration: witnesses are
automatically created and tracked as tasks progress through the
cancellation lifecycle (requested → cancelling → finalizing → completed).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
